articles.title: ‘Everything works in Delhi’: Hotel owner blames ‘other person’ in Malviya Nagar fire probe
articles.description: A devastating fire at a Malviya Nagar hotel, claiming 21 lives, has revealed alleged violations including operating far beyond capacity and lacking fire safety clearance. The owner, arrested, reportedly claimed ignorance of rules and delegated operations. Investigations are underway into structural changes and ownership of multiple properties.

articles.title: Huge fireball, roof collapse: Kuwait shares video of Iranian drone strikes on airport- watch
articles.description: Kuwait International Airport was struck by Iranian drones, causing significant damage to a passenger terminal and resulting in the death of an Indian national and injuries to dozens. Kuwait's defense ministry reported destroying numerous missiles and drones, while the Ministry of External Affairs condemned the attack and called for an immediate cessation of such violence.

articles.description: A significant internal rift has emerged within PTI in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa as lawmakers express dissatisfaction with the party leadership's efforts to secure Imran Khan's release. Disgruntled MPAs, reportedly denied cabinet positions, have penned a letter to the PTI chairman, arguing the release campaign has lost momentum and become ineffective.

articles.title: Sebi bans Rajesh Exports' CMD for fin irregularities
articles.description: Sebi has banned Rajesh Mehta, CMD of Rajesh Exports, from dealing in the company's shares pending further orders. The regulator's investigation revealed significant manipulation of accounts, particularly overseas subsidiary revenues, inflating them by an "egregious" 97%-99%. The company also failed to reflect a Rs 1,035 crore investment in African gold mines.

articles.title: NEET 2026 re-exam questions leaked? NTA rushes Telegram 'paper sale' claims to CyberCrime
articles.description: The National Testing Agency has addressed claims of NEET 2026 question papers being sold on Telegram. This follows the recent cancellation of the NEET UG 2026 examination due to alleged paper leaks. Millions of students were impacted by the cancellation. The Central Bureau of Investigation is now investigating the matter. The Supreme Court has also expressed concerns about examination security.

articles.title: YCMOU Summer Exams 2026 underway for UG and PG courses; direct link to download hall tickets here
articles.description: The Yashwantrao Chavan Maharashtra Open University (YCMOU) has begun its Summer 2026 term-end examinations for undergraduate, postgraduate, and professional courses. Students must carry a printed hall ticket and valid photo ID to exam centers. The university has kept the hall ticket download facility active online for convenience. More than 3.5 lakh students are appearing across 600+ centers in Maharashtra. Exams started on May 28, 2026, and will continue through June in multiple sessions.

articles.title: IB ACIO Final Result 2025 declared: Check selected candidates list and next steps
articles.description: The Intelligence Bureau has released the final results for the ACIO-II/Executive Examination 2025, concluding a multi-stage recruitment process. Candidates' selection was based on their performance in Tier-I, Tier-II, and interview stages. The final list, containing 995 filled vacancies, is now available on the official website for candidates to check their status.

articles.title: WBJEEB ANM GNM Admit Card 2026 out today; download hall ticket before June 14 exam
articles.description: ANM GNM Admit Card 2026: The West Bengal Joint Entrance Examinations Board (WBJEEB) is set to release the ANM GNM Admit Card 2026 on June 4 for candidates appearing in the nursing entrance exam scheduled on June 14. Registered applicants can download their hall tickets from the official ANM-GNM portal using their application credentials. The offline examination will be conducted in a single shift from 12:00 PM to 1:30 PM. Candidates should verify all details and carry a printed admit card to the exam center.

articles.title: Peddi Movie Review and Release Live Updates
articles.full_text: Peak satisfaction ð­ð­ Always a Proud fan girl â¤ï¸ð¥ð¥ @AlwaysRamCharan #BlockbusterPeddi #Ramcharan pic.twitter.com/1gZjlJFDwq Rahman believes the film talks about pushing limits and challenging boundaries. He connected the concept with personal belief. He said, "The rise of human spirit. The potential is defined by your brain. If you think you can lift 10 kg, thatâs all youâll be able to do. If you think, I can lift 100 kgâ¦." Rahman also explained how he connected sports and music together. He felt both fields require belief and determination. He said, "Human achievement in sports or music, we define it. If you set limitationsâ¦you see a character like Peddi. Like a polymath of sports, he plays cricket, kushti and more. Itâs possible for a human mind to achieve when thereâs no walls in your mind." He said, "The way Ram Charan transformed into this character. To make a fictional character look so real in soul and spiritâ¦that was stunning for me." Ram Charan recently spoke about his experience of playing the role. He described it as one of the most demanding characters of his career. He said, "I am very fortunate to be playing the character. We are representing a section of people that are unheard, who need the voice and need the recognition. And to play a character like that, which is very necessary in a country like India. I feel very proud and fortunate to come across a role like this". Game Changer had reportedly collected Rs 26.8 crore through advance booking. The film had also sold approximately 9.3 lakh tickets before release. Advance booking numbers indicate positive movement for the film. Early sales have delivered encouraging signs before release. The film has attracted attention through its promotional campaign. Fans have closely followed every development surrounding the project. Warangal has emerged as one of the strongest-performing markets. The region is tracking nearly 84 percent occupancy. Visakhapatnam has reached 58 percent occupancy. Vijayawada stands at approximately 53 percent. Andhra Pradesh is currently tracking around 33 percent real occupancy. Telangana remains near 29 percent. The strongest response has come from Andhra Pradesh and Telangana. These regions continue to remain the film's biggest markets.  Andhra Pradesh has generated nearly Rs 8.74 crore gross with block seats included. The state has emerged as the leading contributor. Ram Charan's much-awaited sports action drama Peddi is entering theatres with strong momentum. The film has posted impressive advance booking numbers in India and overseas. With only a day remaining before release, expectations have increased significantly around its opening performance. Visakhapatnam follows with around Rs 1.37 crore. Vijayawada, Guntur, Kakinada and Warangal have also recorded strong advances.

articles.title: Elon Musk shares 'Iliad' trailer amid 'The Odyssey' controversy - WATCH
articles.description: Elon Musk has unveiled an AI-generated trailer for 'Iliad', created using his company's new Grok Imagine 1.5 model. This comes amid ongoing online debate surrounding Christopher Nolan's upcoming adaptation of Homer's 'The Odyssey'.

articles.title: Ranveer's 'Don 3' row: Producers Guild to hold FRESH TALKS
articles.description: The Producers Guild of India is mediating the 'Don 3' dispute between Ranveer Singh and Excel Entertainment after FWICE withdrew its non-cooperation directive. The Guild aims for an amicable resolution and clearer industry protocols. Excel Entertainment has cleared pending payments despite reported losses, signaling a potential shift in Bollywood's professional agreements. Read on to know more in detail.

articles.title: Molly-Mae Hague and Tommy Fury welcome second child
articles.description: Molly-Mae Hague and Tommy Fury, known from their Love Island fame, have officially grown their family with the birth of their second child, completing their quartet. Their firstborn, Bambi, aged three, can now look forward to sharing her childhood adventures with a new sibling, fulfilling Molly-Mae's heartfelt wish to replicate the close-knit sibling relationship she enjoys with her own sister.
